competitions.product: Welcome to
competitions.product_info: Welcome to The Time Vault Club Where passion for horology meets opportunity. We exist to bring the world of exceptional watchmaking closer to you, from iconic Swiss craftsmanship to bespoke British design. Through our curated competitions, we give you the chance to discover and own watches most people only dream of. LIVE COMPETITION All of our prize draws are hosted live, so you can witness every moment as dream watches find new owners. With regular competitions featuring everything from iconic Swiss classics to standout modern releases, the next opportunity is always closer than you think. competitions.product: WIN A PATEK PHILIPPE CALATRAVA 5022J 18K SOLID GOLD W/ ORIGINAL PAPERWORK
competitions.product_info: Home – Patek Philippe Calatrava 5022J Solid 18k Gold WIN A PATEK PHILIPPE CALATRAVA 5022J 18K SOLID GOLD W/ ORIGINAL PAPERWORK Value: £11,500 Duration: 14 Days Age: Dated 2001 Max. Entries: 899 Ticket Price: £25 Live Draw: 09/06/26 The Patek Philippe Calatrava is one of the most celebrated dress watches of all time. The 5022J is one of its best iterations, crafted in 18k solid yellow gold and featuring a stunning white Porcelain dial with Breguet numerals and hands . With an incredibly sleek profile thanks to its ultra-slim calibre 215 manual wind movement , this Calatrava is a very fine, elegant watch for both men and women. This example is in exceptional condition and comes with its original paperwork , whilst fitted to a superb custom Molequin strap to fit its original 18k gold Patek Philippe pin buckle. 41.27% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 371 899 41.27% 528 Tickets remaining 528/899 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 4 Days 19 Hours 2 Minutes 38 Seconds ENTER NOW WIN A PATEK PHILIPPE CALATRAVA 5022J 18K GOLD ENTER NOW 41.27% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 371 899 41.27% 528 Tickets remaining 528/899 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 4 Days 19 Hours 2 Minutes 38 Seconds Value: £11,500 Duration: 14 days Age: Dated 2001 Entries: 899 Max. Ticket Price: £25 Live Draw: 09/06/2026 The Patek Philippe Calatrava is one of the most celebrated dress watches of all time – and the 5022J is one of its best iterations, crafted in 18k solid yellow gold and featuring a stunning white Porcelain dial with Breguet numerals and hands . With an incredibly sleek profile thanks to its ultra-slim calibre 215 manual wind movement , this Calatrava is a very fine, elegant watch for both men and women. This example is in exceptional condition and comes with its original paperwork , whilst fitted to a superb custom Molequin strap to fit its original 18k gold Patek Philippe pin buckle. #27 - The Patek Philippe Calatrava 5022J Porcelain Dial Solid 18k Gold w/ Original Paperwork The History— The Example The Patek Philippe Calatrava has long been considered one of the greatest dress watches, known for its perfect proportions, restraint and understated elegance. This reference, the 5022J , is a particularly attractive modern classic iteration of the model, crafted in 18k solid yellow gold and featuring a beautiful white porcelain dial with elegant Breguet numerals and matching hands . Powered by the ultra-slim Patek Philippe calibre 215 manual wind movement, the watch has an incredibly sleek profile on the wrist, wearing with the sort of refinement expected from a Calatrava. At 33mm its classic proportions make it equally elegant for both men and women . This example is presented in exceptional condition and is accompanied by its original paperwork . It is currently fitted to a superb custom Molequin strap , paired with its original 18k gold Patek Philippe pin buckle . A beautifully executed and highly elegant Calatrava, combining classic Patek Philippe design with subtle, refined details throughout. ENTER NOW The First Competition of its Kind The Vintage Watch Draw is unique. We’re the first competition website dedicated to collector-grade vintage watches, backed by a trusted expert. After the initial idea over five years ago, we’re so excited to now bring this new concept to you. Curated by A Trusted Expert Our competitions are curated by Alex Stevens, a trusted & reputable vintage watch specialist with lifelong experience in the trade. 12 Month Service Warranty Every watch is fully serviced by our watchmaker & comes with a 12 month mechanical warranty, so you can enjoy your watch hassle-free. Collector-Grade Condition Every watch is meticulously curated by Alex, known for selecting only the finest, collector-grade examples in terms of condition & originality. Low & Transparent Odds We don’t flood the draw with tickets. Our competitions are deliberately limited to keep odds low & your chance of winning fair. Authenticity Guarantee Every watch is thoroughly inspected & fully authenticated by our in-house expert. We are professionals, not enthusiasts or hobbyists. Guaranteed Draws Every draw ends on the stated date, no matter what. We never extend our competitions, even if we haven't sold all the tickets.
